metadata.description: Official BeeL plugins for Claude Code

plugins.name: beel-api
plugins.description: BeeL invoicing API integration guide. Activates automatically when working with the BeeL API.

plugins.name: stripe
plugins.description: Audits a Stripe integration for security issues and antipatterns: missing webhook signature verification, missing idempotency keys, outdated API versions, broken subscription/proration logic, leaked or over-scoped keys. Read-only. Produces a structured report.
